description: Create a custom HTML travel dashboard at /home/ga/Desktop/travel_dashboard.html and configure Microsoft Edge to open this file (file:///home/ga/Desktop/travel_dashboard.html) automatically upon startup. The dashboard must contain valid HTML with clickable links to flightaware.com, xe.com, travel.state.gov, timeanddate.com, weather.gov, and at least two of the following airlines: united.com, delta.com, aa.com, southwest.com, or jetblue.com.
